description_long: This community center is a large, modern complex surrounded by a perimeter fence and landscaped with rows of trees and shrubs. The main building features a flat roof with multiple skylights or solar panels, and several interconnected wings with varying roof heights. There is a spacious parking area at the front, with marked spaces and a driveway leading to the entrance. On one side, a large outdoor swimming pool is accompanied by lounge chairs and a green lawn, providing recreational space. The grounds are meticulously organized, with paved walkways, outdoor seating areas, and a mix of open and shaded zones. The overall design emphasizes accessibility, openness, and integration with outdoor amenities.
description: A modern, expansive community center with flat roofs, solar panels, landscaped grounds, a large parking lot, and an outdoor pool area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, parking lot with several cars, and a row of trees lining the approach.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool area, outdoor seating, and the extensive green space adjacent to the building.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, lounge chairs, and the back facade of the building with additional trees and open space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the driveway, parking area, and the building's interconnected wings with visible skylights.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance is visible at the front, featuring a wide, flat-roofed canopy and large glass doors. The entrance is accessible from the parking lot via a paved walkway and is flanked by trees. The design is modern and functional, with no visible steps, suggesting level access for all users.
attribute_architectural_style: Contemporary style with flat roofs, large glass surfaces, clean lines, and minimal ornamentation. The use of solar panels and integration with landscaped outdoor spaces further emphasizes a modern, sustainable design.
